completed_tasks: Rolled back the rejected Edwin document-chord treatment.
Applied Score Scheherazade New Bold to roots, triangle and minus qualities, extension numbers, accidentals, slash marks, and bass letters.
Matched the user-selected comparison row with 72% native-baseline quality suffixes.
Kept only true alterations and modifiers such as flat-nine and sharp-nine raised.

notes: The staff engraving font, song data, alphaTex generation, responsive score density, routes, global theme, and dependencies were not changed.
The SVG transformation remains scoped by the existing compact-chord marker and preserves the original chord source for idempotent rerendering.
The final browser evidence was captured at 375px, 390px, and 430px with devicePixelRatio 3 and at 1024px desktop width.
